name: Furion S401 Spot

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E95B3100-3BCD-11E9-8B23-525400685065

comment: Infinity S401 Spot is a moving head with high output and great effects. It is equipped with a gravity sensor which controls not only the orientation within the menu but, if so desired, also inverts automatically the Pan movement.
